host.label: TV IP Address
host.help: e.g. 192.168.1.105 — assign a static IP in your router (DHCP reservation)

macAddress.label: MAC Address (for Wake-on-LAN)
macAddress.help: Required to turn on TV over network. Find it in TV Settings → Network → Wired/Wi-Fi Connection → Advanced. Format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF

reconnectInterval.label: Reconnect interval (seconds)
reconnectInterval.help: Time to wait after losing connection before retrying
